title: Ambiance Music: Epic
description: This pack changes all of the Overworld music into an epic soundtrack to upgrade your experience and make you feel like your world is Grandiose.
body:
# New epic music to upgrade your experience!🔥


## ⚔️ This pack changes all of the Overworld music into an epic soundtrack to upgrade your experience and make you feel like your world is Grandiose.⚔️
## 


### 🪽IT WILL GIVE YOU WINGS.🪽
### 
### It will give you the glorious feeling like when you watch Lord of the Rings and there is that epic music in the background. It’s basically the same thing and I’m looking forward to make it even better! Stay tuned for updates!
### 


ATTENTION MODPACK CREATORS If you are looking forward to creating a modpack, this resource pack will make the rest of your creation feel big and epic. Combined with a good shader it will make the perfect combo to give the feeling that your world is huge and epic.

Just on the side, I own a server on discord for general gaming and artist that I’m looking forward to grow so feel free to join and chat with some other gamers or artist like you :)

https://discord.gg/UvVffJ633w
